title: Louisiana delays US House primary to draw new map after Supreme Court ruling
summary: By Joseph Ax April 30 (Reuters) - Republican Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry on Thursday suspended the state's May 16 congressional primary election just two days before early voting was set to begin,
contents:
## Article

**Source**: Yahoo News - World (via Reuters)
**Published**: 2026-04-30T20:29:35.000Z
**URL**: https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/louisiana-delays-us-house-primary-202935911.html

### Headline

Louisiana delays US House primary to draw new map after Supreme Court ruling

### Reported Details

By Joseph Ax April 30 (Reuters) - Republican Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry on Thursday suspended the state's May 16 congressional primary election just two days before early voting became set to begin,

By Joseph Ax April 30 (Reuters) - Republican Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry on Thursday suspended the state's May 16 congressional primary election just two days before early voting became set to begin,

## Reporting Context

Yahoo News aggregates international wire-service dispatches with editorial filtering. Cross-referencing with original wire reports (Reuters, AP, AFP) supports verification. This entry reflects an article surfaced and timestamped within the OSINT collection window. Independent confirmation through additional outlets remains advisable for high-impact claims.
